fields.name: Created by Application
fields.tooltip: Specifies the integrated app or product that the approval request comes from.

fields.name: Initiated By User ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the User ID which has initiated the approval.

fields.name: To Be Approved By User ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the user ID that needs to approve the action.

fields.name: Date-Time Initiated
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date and time that the approvals were initiated.

fields.name: Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies the status of the approval on the line.

fields.name: Due Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies when the approval is due.
